queries.description: Number of compositions grouped by template.
queries.aql: SELECT c/archetype_details/template_id/value AS Template, COUNT(c) AS N FROM EHR e CONTAINS COMPOSITION c GROUP BY c/archetype_details/template_id/value

queries.description: Latest blood pressure per EHR (systolic + diastolic).
queries.aql: SELECT e/ehr_id/value AS EhrId, o/data[at0001]/events[at0006]/data[at0003]/items[at0004]/value/magnitude AS Systolic, o/data[at0001]/events[at0006]/data[at0003]/items[at0005]/value/magnitude AS Diastolic, o/data[at0001]/events[at0006]/time/value AS Taken FROM EHR e CONTAINS COMPOSITION c CONTAINS OBSERVATION o [openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.blood_pressure.v2] ORDER BY Taken DESC LIMIT 100

queries.description: Lab results within a relative date window (last 365 days).
queries.aql: SELECT e/ehr_id/value AS EhrId, o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/data[at0003]/items[at0005]/value/magnitude AS Value, o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/data[at0003]/items[at0005]/value/units AS Units, o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/time/value AS Taken FROM EHR e CONTAINS COMPOSITION c CONTAINS OBSERVATION o [openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.laboratory_test_result.v1] WHERE o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/time/value >= :from AND o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/time/value <= :to

queries.description: Count EHRs by gender from demographic composition.
queries.aql: SELECT e/ehr_status/subject/external_ref/id/value AS SubjectId, e/ehr_id/value AS EhrId FROM EHR e

queries.description: Minimal sanity query — should work on any seeded EHRbase.
queries.aql: SELECT e/ehr_id/value AS EhrId FROM EHR e LIMIT 1
